title: Adding OR and NOT to Subitem automation builder

posts.author: ABERNARD (ALEX BERNARD)
posts.cookedHtml:
This feature was released for Item automations, but the Subitem automation builder lacks the same recipe ability.

Examples:

  • Update an Item’s status to “Completed” if all Subitem statuses are “completed” OR Subitem statuses are “n/a”.

  • Update an Item’s status to “In Progress” if all Subitem statuses are “anything” and Subitem Status is not “completed” and subitem Status is not “not started.”
